query:
SELECT
                t.id, t.name, t.slug,
                COUNT(r.id) as "recipe_count!"
            FROM tags t
            JOIN recipe_tags rt ON rt.tag_id = t.id
            JOIN recipes r ON r.id = rt.recipe_id AND r.visibility = 'public'
            GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.slug
            ORDER BY COUNT(r.id) DESC, t.name
